records.Head / Key office-bearer: Mahant Ravindra Puri, President; Secretary, Panchayati Akhara Shri Niranjani
records.Primary postal address / base: Panchayati Akhara Shri Niranjani, Mayapur, Haridwar - 249401
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Older listings also mention ABAP base at Ayodhya/Prayagraj; for current president outreach use Niranjani Haridwar address.
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Send one full Sevanidhi Act covering letter to ABAP President separately.

records.Primary postal address / base: Baba Hanuman Ghat, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Pracheen Shri Panchdashnam Juna Akhada Bhawan, Near Maya Devi Parking / Upper Road, Haridwar - 249401, Uttarakhand; Harihar Ashram, Haridwar - 249808
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Mail to Varanasi base and copy to Haridwar/Harihar Ashram for quicker receipt.

records.Head / Key office-bearer: Acharya Mahamandaleshwar Swami Kailashanand Giri; Mahant Ravindra Puri is key office-bearer/ABAP President
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Panchayati Akhara Shri Niranjani, Mayapur, Haridwar - 249401, Uttarakhand
records.Contact confidence: High for Mahant Ravindra Puri contact; directory phone needs confirmation
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: For vetting, address to Acharya Mahamandaleshwar and copy to Mahant Ravindra Puri.

records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Trimbakeshwar branch: Shripanchayati Atal Akhada, Gangadwar Pahili Payari, Trimbakeshwar, Nashik, Maharashtra
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Postal address is usable; phone is branch/mahant directory and should be verified before calling.

records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Branches: Haridwar, Ujjain, Baroda; head office also described in some sources as Kashi/Varanasi
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Send to Daraganj base; also email info@akhada.org.

records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Near Ganapat Bari, Jawhar Road, Trimbakeshwar, Nashik, Maharashtra (branch/directory listing)
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Use registered post to Trimbakeshwar base; phone confirmation advised.

records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Local ashram/camp at Madouka, Prayagraj used for Mahakumbh 2025 entry procession
records.Phone / Mobile: Not found as reliable central public phone
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Send by registered post to Dashashwamedh Ghat base.

records.Head / Key office-bearer: Acharya Mahamandaleshwar Shri Mat Ram Krishnanand
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Some sources describe main centre/HQ as Varanasi; branches at Haridwar, Prayagraj/Allahabad, Ujjain, Nashik, Ahmedabad, Junagadh
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Because base/HQ sources vary, mail to Junagadh base and also seek confirmation through Kumbh/Trimbak contact.

records.Head / Key office-bearer: Head position reported vacant in Jan 2025 TOI profile
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Nashik branch/directory: Shri Digambar Ani Akhara, Tapovan, Panchvati, Nashik, Maharashtra
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Mail to Gujarat base; call Nashik contact to identify current secretary/recipient.

records.Akhada / Body: Shri Panch Nirvani Ani Akhara / Nirvani Ani Akhara Hanuman Garhi
records.Head / Key office-bearer: Shri Mahant Murli Das (TOI 2025); directory lists Shri Mahant Rajendradas Ji
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Bairagi Camp, Kankhal/Indra Basti, Haridwar - 249401, Uttarakhand (public listing)
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Send to Hanuman Garhi, Ayodhya; use directory phones only to confirm dispatch.

records.Akhada / Body: Akhil Bhartiya Shri Panch Nirmohi Ani Akhara
records.Head / Key office-bearer: Shri Mahant Rajendra Das Maharaj (TOI 2025); Ayodhya litigation context also names Mahant Dinendra Das
records.Primary postal address / base: Dheer Sameer Mandir, Bansivat, Vrindavan, Mathura, Uttar Pradesh
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Sri Panch Ramanandiya Akhil Bhartiya Nirmohi Akhada, Nirmohi Bazar, Ram Ghat, Ram Nagar, Ayodhya - 224123, Uttar Pradesh
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: For Sevanidhi vetting, send to both Vrindavan base and Ayodhya address.

records.Head / Key office-bearer: TOI 2025: Shri Mukhiya Mahant Durgadas and three other Mukhiyas; other listing: Mahant Maheshwar Das Maharaj
records.Primary postal address / base: 58/46, Kydganj Road, Krishna Nagar, Kydganj, Prayagraj - 211003, Uttar Pradesh
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Kankhal/Rajghat, Haridwar branch; Trimbakeshwar branch: Shri Panchayati Bada Udasin Akhara, Trimbak Ring Road, Trimbakeshwar, Nashik - 422212
records.Contact confidence: Medium for postal address; low-medium for branch phone
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Use Prayagraj HQ address; add 'Attn: Shri Panch / Mukhiya Mahant'.

records.Akhada / Body: Shri Panchayati Naya Udasin Akhara / Naya Udaseen Nirvana
records.Head / Key office-bearer: Official site: Mahant Shri Bhagat Ram Ji, Akhada Pramukh; Secretary Shri Jagtar Muni Ji
records.Primary postal address / base: 314/4, Myana Mohalla Road, Kankhal, Haridwar - 249408, Uttarakhand
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Alternative listing: Daksha Mandir Road, Mohalla Miaria/Mayapur, Kankhal, Haridwar - 249408
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Good postal address available; send registered post and WhatsApp/call if needed.

records.Head / Key office-bearer: Shri Mahant Swami Gyan Dev Singh Maharaj / Shri Gyan Dev
records.Primary postal address / base: Sati Ghat Road, Mohalla Miaria, Kankhal, Haridwar - 249408, Uttarakhand
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Nirmal Atithi Bhawan contact also available through Nirmal Akhara website
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Send to official Kankhal address and email PDF to panchayati@nirmalakhara.org.

records.Recognised status: Not one of traditional 13; visible at Kumbh and associated with Juna in past reporting
records.Head / Key office-bearer: Founder references include Rishi Ajay Das; public leadership has included Acharya Mahamandaleshwar Laxmi Narayan Tripathi; leadership contested/split in 2025
records.Primary postal address / base: Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh (public social listing); no stable HQ postal address confirmed
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Use website contact first; postal address needs direct confirmation
records.Contact confidence: Medium for phone/email; low for postal address
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Do not send physical copy until HQ address is confirmed by phone/email.

records.Recognised status: New body reported in Nov 2025; not part of traditional 13
records.Head / Key office-bearer: Swami Kaushalya Nand Giri / Tina Maa reported as Acharya Mahamandaleshwar
records.Primary postal address / base: Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh (reported place of formal establishment); no postal HQ found
records.Additional practical mailing address / b: Postal address not yet confirmed from official source
records.Notes for Sevanidhi Act mailing: Keep in supplementary list; communicate only after verifying address.

headers: Communication-ready mailing list for sending Sanatan Seva Nidhi Act for review/vetting.

records.Communication-ready mailing list for sen: 13 traditionally recognised Akharas, ABAP apex row, and supplementary Kinnar Akhara rows.
Many Akharas do not maintain a modern central secretariat, so some phone numbers are branch/public-directory numbers. Use the Contact confidence column before calling.
Send registered post/speed post to primary base address. Where an additional practical mailing address exists, send a second copy.
Where email is available, send a PDF copy with covering letter and mention physical dispatch number.

records.col_1: Representative major pan-India and state-influential Hindu/Sanatan institutions, mathas, akharas, missions, and trusts. It is not a claim of exhaustive coverage.
Mail-merge ready: Institution, head, address, email, phone, website and source columns are separated.
Some institutions do not publish central email/phone details. Such fields are marked 'Not found publicly'. Please verify before dispatching formal letters.
Source URL(s) are provided row-wise in the Master Directory and repeated in category sheets.
